prompt: The Archive — a deep scholarly study and library interior, 16:9 cinematic wide shot, no people. Warm pools of amber lamplight against deep shadow. Floor-to-ceiling shelves hold manuscripts, scrolls, and clay tablets from many cultures receding into soft blur. A long wooden worktable in the foreground holds an open illuminated codex, a cuneiform clay tablet, a rolled papyrus scroll, and one recurring brass desk lamp with a soft glow. Documentary prestige aesthetic, rich wood and parchment textures, instant-recognition recurring TV host desk energy but ancient-archive themed, photoreal cinematic lighting.
